moments.title: England in World Cup Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: England defeated Mexico 3-2 in a thrilling Last 16 match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 and now face Norway in the Quarter-Finals on Saturday.

angles.name: England's next challenge
angles.copy: England are through to the World Cup Quarter-Finals! After a dramatic 3-2 win over Mexico, it's Norway next up on Saturday. Can the Three Lions keep the dream alive?

angles.name: Match Recap
angles.copy: What a night! Bellingham's brace and Kane's penalty sealed a 3-2 victory for England against Mexico in the World Cup Last 16. Did you stay up for it?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon are in their second week, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals scheduled for July 11th and 12th respectively.

angles.name: Finals Countdown
angles.copy: Centre Court awaits! It's finals week at Wimbledon with the biggest titles up for grabs this weekend. Who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: Second Week Action
angles.copy: The grass courts are buzzing for the final week of Wimbledon 2026! Expect some epic battles as players fight for a spot in the history books.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has spent a 15th non-consecutive week at UK Number 1, equalling Wet Wet Wet's record for the longest-running British Number 1 single ever.

angles.name: Chart Record Breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 for an incredible 15th week, equalling a British chart record. Are you still streaming it?

angles.name: British Chart Dominance
angles.copy: Fifteen weeks and counting for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' has cemented its place in UK chart history. What's your favourite track from the duo?

moments.title: Madonna's 'Danceteria' new chart entry
moments.blurb: Following the release of her new album 'CONFESSIONS II', Madonna's new single 'Danceteria' is the highest new entry in the UK singles chart, currently at Number 20.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Returns
angles.copy: Madonna is back in the charts! Her new single 'Danceteria' is this week's highest new entry. Have you heard it yet?

angles.name: New Album Buzz
angles.copy: With 'CONFESSIONS II' dropping, Madonna's 'Danceteria' is making waves on the Official Singles Chart. What are your first impressions of the new track?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Aftermath
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone concluded yesterday, July 5th, with post-race discussions and concerts still buzzing.

angles.name: Silverstone Review
angles.copy: What a weekend at Silverstone! The British Grand Prix delivered all the drama. Who was your driver of the race?

angles.name: GP Concerts
angles.copy: Beyond the track, the British GP weekend saw performances from David Guetta, Richard Ashcroft, Chase & Status, and James Arthur! What was your highlight?

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: Australia defeated England in the final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup yesterday, July 5th.

angles.name: World Cup Final Reaction
angles.copy: Tough break for England in the Women's T20 World Cup Final against Australia yesterday. Still, what an effort from the team throughout the tournament!

angles.name: Cricket Heroines
angles.copy: Despite the result, England's women's cricket team had a fantastic run in the T20 World Cup. Who was your standout player of the tournament?

moments.title: Happy 51st to 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper and actor 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday today, July 6th.

angles.name: 50 Cent's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! What's your favourite track from the hip-hop icon?

moments.title: Spandau Ballet's John Keeble turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for iconic new wave band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday today, July 6th.

angles.name: Spandau Ballet Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble, the legendary drummer from Spandau Ballet! What's your go-to Spandau classic?

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday tomorrow, July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Ringo Starr turns 86! Send your birthday wishes to The Beatles' iconic drummer.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place in Moseley Park, Birmingham from July 10-12, featuring innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for good vibes! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off this Friday in Birmingham. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: Into the Woods Festival in Wales
moments.blurb: The boutique Into the Woods Festival, focusing on electronic music and nature, runs from July 10-11 in Piercefield Park, Wales.

angles.name: Welsh Electronic Music
angles.copy: Into the Woods Festival is almost here! Electronic music meets nature in Piercefield Park, Wales, this weekend. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Escape to the Country returns
moments.blurb: Season 33 of the popular reality series 'Escape to the Country' premieres on BritBox on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Country Living Dreams
angles.copy: Dreaming of a rural retreat? 'Escape to the Country' is back for its 33rd season on BritBox this Friday!

moments.title: New 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic 'Little House on the Prairie' series, based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's books, premieres on Netflix on July 9th.

angles.name: Family Classic Returns
angles.copy: Get ready to revisit the Ingalls family! A brand new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' drops on Netflix this Thursday.

moments.title: Wales Nature Week underway
moments.blurb: Wales Nature Week is running from July 4th to 12th, with over 15 events across North Wales encouraging people to connect with local wildlife and green spaces.

angles.name: Explore Welsh Nature
angles.copy: It's Wales Nature Week! Get out and explore the incredible wildlife and green spaces across North Wales until July 12th. What's happening near you?

moments.title: Exeter Community Family Picnic
moments.blurb: As part of Summer Fest 2026, Inclusive Exeter is hosting a Community Family Picnic at Cockington Country Park in Torquay this Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Exeter Family Fun
angles.copy: Looking for family fun this weekend? Inclusive Exeter's Community Family Picnic is at Cockington Country Park on Sunday, July 12th!

moments.title: Heart of Wales 7s Wrap-up
moments.blurb: The Heart of Wales 7s, Wales' largest sports and music festival, concluded yesterday, July 5th, breaking attendance records in Llanidloes.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Success
angles.copy: What a weekend for the Heart of Wales 7s! The Llanidloes festival broke attendance records, solidifying its spot as Wales' biggest sports and music event.

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which is launching this July and sees her play a social humanoid robot.

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is coming to BBC One this July. Are you tuning in?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival returns on Saturday, July 11th, with a lineup spanning music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: London Festival Alert
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Ally Pally this Saturday, July 11th! Expect a fantastic day of music, comedy, and more.
